results.change_action: may be accepted if verifiable with both secrets
results.change_condition: During a limited transition window after server secret rotation.
results.new_value: accepted under either of two secrets
results.related_state_or_step: server cookie verification after secret change
results.comment: cookie-secret rotation is an optional operational strategy; no library-level server cookie secret rotation path is exposed
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Message; Section 5.2/5.3 cookie exchange discussion
results.comparison_summary: 需求：During a limited transition window after server secret rotation. 时 legacy_cookie may be accepted if verifiable with both secrets。标准：RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Message; Section 5.2/5.3 cookie exchange discussion；原始抽取依据为：If the server wishes to allow legitimate clients to handshake through the transition (e.g., a client received a cookie with Secret 1 and then sent the second ClientHello after the server has changed to Secret 2), the server can have a limited window during which it accepts both secrets. ... An alternative approach is simply to try verifying with both secrets.。代码：DTLS 1.3 ClientHello carries a DTLS legacy_cookie field for wire compatibility, but the RFC requires a DTLS 1.3-only ClientHello to use a zero-length legacy_cookie and requires aborting on any other value. BoringSSL serializes an empty field for its own initial DTLS 1.3 ClientHello and rejects DTLS 1.3 HelloVerifyRequest in runner tests, but the server parse path only stores client_hello.dtls_cookie and no DTLS 1.3 server path validates non-zero legacy_cookie or maps it to illegal_parameter. 结论：cookie-secret rotation is an optional operational strategy; no library-level server cookie secret rotation path is exposed。

results.change_action: invalid if value check fails; terminate handshake
results.change_condition: If a server receives a ClientHello with an invalid cookie.
results.comment: DTLS 1.3 non-zero or invalid legacy_cookie is parsed but no server-side DTLS 1.3 illegal_parameter rejection path was found
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Message; Section 5.2/5.3 cookie exchange discussion
results.comparison_summary: 需求：If a server receives a ClientHello with an invalid cookie. 时 legacy_cookie invalid if value check fails; terminate handshake。标准：RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Message; Section 5.2/5.3 cookie exchange discussion；原始抽取依据为：If a server receives a ClientHello with an invalid cookie, it MUST terminate the handshake with an "illegal_parameter" alert.。代码：DTLS 1.3 ClientHello carries a DTLS legacy_cookie field for wire compatibility, but the RFC requires a DTLS 1.3-only ClientHello to use a zero-length legacy_cookie and requires aborting on any other value. BoringSSL serializes an empty field for its own initial DTLS 1.3 ClientHello and rejects DTLS 1.3 HelloVerifyRequest in runner tests, but the server parse path only stores client_hello.dtls_cookie and no DTLS 1.3 server path validates non-zero legacy_cookie or maps it to illegal_parameter. 结论：DTLS 1.3 non-zero or invalid legacy_cookie is parsed but no server-side DTLS 1.3 illegal_parameter rejection path was found。

results.change_condition: Server changes the secret value frequently.
results.comment: frequent server secret rotation is one possible anti-DoS cookie implementation strategy, not a mandatory behavior for every endpoint
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Message; Section 5.2/5.3 cookie exchange discussion
results.comparison_summary: 需求：Server changes the secret value frequently. 时 legacy_cookie invalidated by secret change。标准：RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Message; Section 5.2/5.3 cookie exchange discussion；原始抽取依据为：The server can defend against this attack by changing the secret value frequently, thus invalidating those cookies.。代码：DTLS 1.3 ClientHello carries a DTLS legacy_cookie field for wire compatibility, but the RFC requires a DTLS 1.3-only ClientHello to use a zero-length legacy_cookie and requires aborting on any other value. BoringSSL serializes an empty field for its own initial DTLS 1.3 ClientHello and rejects DTLS 1.3 HelloVerifyRequest in runner tests, but the server parse path only stores client_hello.dtls_cookie and no DTLS 1.3 server path validates non-zero legacy_cookie or maps it to illegal_parameter. 结论：frequent server secret rotation is one possible anti-DoS cookie implementation strategy, not a mandatory behavior for every endpoint。

results.change_action: invalid if generated outside allowed time interval
results.change_condition: Server stores timestamps in the cookie.
results.comment: timestamped cookies are an alternative server policy, not a mandatory RFC behavior
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Message; Section 5.2/5.3 cookie exchange discussion
results.comparison_summary: 需求：Server stores timestamps in the cookie. 时 legacy_cookie invalid if generated outside allowed time interval。标准：RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Message; Section 5.2/5.3 cookie exchange discussion；原始抽取依据为：Alternatively, the server can store timestamps in the cookie and reject cookies that were generated outside a certain interval of time.。代码：DTLS 1.3 ClientHello carries a DTLS legacy_cookie field for wire compatibility, but the RFC requires a DTLS 1.3-only ClientHello to use a zero-length legacy_cookie and requires aborting on any other value. BoringSSL serializes an empty field for its own initial DTLS 1.3 ClientHello and rejects DTLS 1.3 HelloVerifyRequest in runner tests, but the server parse path only stores client_hello.dtls_cookie and no DTLS 1.3 server path validates non-zero legacy_cookie or maps it to illegal_parameter. 结论：timestamped cookies are an alternative server policy, not a mandatory RFC behavior。

results.change_condition: When sending the initial ClientHello, the client does not have a cookie yet.
results.new_value: zero-length vector (a zero-valued single byte length field)
results.comment: 相关标准要求由 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 路径实现；代码证据覆盖构造、解析、状态更新或错误处理路径
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Message; Section 5.2/5.3 cookie exchange discussion
results.comparison_summary: 需求：When sending the initial ClientHello, the client does not have a cookie yet. 时 legacy_cookie must equal zero-length vector。标准：RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Message; Section 5.2/5.3 cookie exchange discussion；原始抽取依据为：When sending the initial ClientHello, the client does not have a cookie yet. In this case, the "cookie" extension is omitted and the legacy_cookie field in the ClientHello message MUST be set to a zero-length vector (i.e., a zero-valued single byte length field).。代码：DTLS 1.3 ClientHello carries a DTLS legacy_cookie field for wire compatibility, but the RFC requires a DTLS 1.3-only ClientHello to use a zero-length legacy_cookie and requires aborting on any other value. BoringSSL serializes an empty field for its own initial DTLS 1.3 ClientHello and rejects DTLS 1.3 HelloVerifyRequest in runner tests, but the server parse path only stores client_hello.dtls_cookie and no DTLS 1.3 server path validates non-zero legacy_cookie or maps it to illegal_parameter. 结论：相关标准要求由 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 路径实现；代码证据覆盖构造、解析、状态更新或错误处理路径。

results.change_condition: When the second ClientHello is received.
results.comment: client-side HRR cookie extension support exists, but BoringSSL's DTLS 1.3 server never sends/verifies HRR cookies and the legacy_cookie server field is not validated
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Message; Section 5.2/5.3 cookie exchange discussion
results.comparison_summary: 需求：When the second ClientHello is received. 时 legacy_cookie must be validated。标准：RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Message; Section 5.2/5.3 cookie exchange discussion；原始抽取依据为：When the second ClientHello is received, the server can verify that the cookie is valid and that the client can receive packets at the given IP address.。代码：DTLS 1.3 ClientHello carries a DTLS legacy_cookie field for wire compatibility, but the RFC requires a DTLS 1.3-only ClientHello to use a zero-length legacy_cookie and requires aborting on any other value. BoringSSL serializes an empty field for its own initial DTLS 1.3 ClientHello and rejects DTLS 1.3 HelloVerifyRequest in runner tests, but the server parse path only stores client_hello.dtls_cookie and no DTLS 1.3 server path validates non-zero legacy_cookie or maps it to illegal_parameter. 结论：client-side HRR cookie extension support exists, but BoringSSL's DTLS 1.3 server never sends/verifies HRR cookies and the legacy_cookie server field is not validated。

results.change_condition: in DTLS 1.3 ClientHello received by a DTLS 1.3-compliant server
results.old_value: present cookie field value in ClientHello
results.comment: 相关标准要求由 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 路径实现；代码证据覆盖构造、解析、状态更新或错误处理路径
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Message; Section 5.2/5.3 cookie exchange discussion
results.comparison_summary: 需求：in DTLS 1.3 ClientHello received by a DTLS 1.3-compliant server 时 legacy_cookie ignored。标准：RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Message; Section 5.2/5.3 cookie exchange discussion；原始抽取依据为：For backwards compatibility reasons, the cookie field in the ClientHello is present in DTLS 1.3 but is ignored by a DTLS 1.3-compliant server implementation.。代码：DTLS 1.3 ClientHello carries a DTLS legacy_cookie field for wire compatibility, but the RFC requires a DTLS 1.3-only ClientHello to use a zero-length legacy_cookie and requires aborting on any other value. BoringSSL serializes an empty field for its own initial DTLS 1.3 ClientHello and rejects DTLS 1.3 HelloVerifyRequest in runner tests, but the server parse path only stores client_hello.dtls_cookie and no DTLS 1.3 server path validates non-zero legacy_cookie or maps it to illegal_parameter. 结论：相关标准要求由 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 路径实现；代码证据覆盖构造、解析、状态更新或错误处理路径。

results.change_condition: server receives a DTLS 1.3 ClientHello with any other value in this field
results.comment: server parses legacy_cookie but no DTLS 1.3 check rejects non-zero values with illegal_parameter
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Message; Section 5.2/5.3 cookie exchange discussion
results.comparison_summary: 需求：server receives a DTLS 1.3 ClientHello with any other value in this field 时 legacy_cookie invalid if value check fails。标准：RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Message; Section 5.2/5.3 cookie exchange discussion；原始抽取依据为：If a DTLS 1.3 ClientHello is received with any other value in this field, the server MUST abort the handshake with an "illegal_parameter" alert.。代码：DTLS 1.3 ClientHello carries a DTLS legacy_cookie field for wire compatibility, but the RFC requires a DTLS 1.3-only ClientHello to use a zero-length legacy_cookie and requires aborting on any other value. BoringSSL serializes an empty field for its own initial DTLS 1.3 ClientHello and rejects DTLS 1.3 HelloVerifyRequest in runner tests, but the server parse path only stores client_hello.dtls_cookie and no DTLS 1.3 server path validates non-zero legacy_cookie or maps it to illegal_parameter. 结论：server parses legacy_cookie but no DTLS 1.3 check rejects non-zero values with illegal_parameter。

results.change_condition: For all purposes
results.comment: outgoing DTLS 1.3 record version is compatible, but inbound DTLSPlaintext version is still checked rather than ignored for all purposes
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4, record layer compatibility fields
results.comparison_summary: 需求：For all purposes 时 legacy_record_version must be ignored。标准：RFC 9147 Section 4, record layer compatibility fields；原始抽取依据为：It MUST be ignored for all purposes.。代码：BoringSSL writes DTLS1_VERSION before version negotiation and freezes DTLS 1.3 nonzero-epoch record headers at DTLS 1.2. On receive, however, the legacy record version is not purely ignored: epoch 0 must have the DTLS major byte and later DTLSPlaintext records must match dtls_record_version. 结论：outgoing DTLS 1.3 record version is compatible, but inbound DTLSPlaintext version is still checked rather than ignored for all purposes。
results.category: compatibility validation stricter than RFC wording

results.change_condition: For all records other than the initial ClientHello

results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4, record layer compatibility fields
results.comparison_summary: 需求：For all records other than the initial ClientHello 时 legacy_record_version must equal。标准：RFC 9147 Section 4, record layer compatibility fields；原始抽取依据为：legacy_record_version: This value MUST be set to {254, 253} for all records other than the initial ClientHello。代码：BoringSSL writes DTLS1_VERSION before version negotiation and freezes DTLS 1.3 nonzero-epoch record headers at DTLS 1.2. On receive, however, the legacy record version is not purely ignored: epoch 0 must have the DTLS major byte and later DTLSPlaintext records must match dtls_record_version. 结论：相关标准要求由 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 路径实现；代码证据覆盖构造、解析、状态更新或错误处理路径。

results.comparison_summary: 需求：For the initial ClientHello (i.e., one not generated after a HelloRetryRequest) 时 legacy_record_version may also equal。标准：RFC 9147 Section 4, record layer compatibility fields；原始抽取依据为：the initial ClientHello (i.e., one not generated after a HelloRetryRequest), where it may also be {254, 255} for compatibility purposes.。代码：BoringSSL writes DTLS1_VERSION before version negotiation and freezes DTLS 1.3 nonzero-epoch record headers at DTLS 1.2. On receive, however, the legacy record version is not purely ignored: epoch 0 must have the DTLS major byte and later DTLSPlaintext records must match dtls_record_version. 结论：相关标准要求由 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 路径实现；代码证据覆盖构造、解析、状态更新或错误处理路径。

results.change_condition: DTLS servers processing DTLS 1.3 handshake behavior
results.comment: 相关标准要求由 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 路径实现；代码证据覆盖构造、解析、状态更新或错误处理路径
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3 and Section 5.4, ClientHello and ServerHello
results.comparison_summary: 需求：DTLS servers processing DTLS 1.3 handshake behavior 时 legacy_session_id must not echo。标准：RFC 9147 Section 5.3 and Section 5.4, ClientHello and ServerHello；原始抽取依据为：DTLS servers MUST NOT echo the "legacy_session_id" value from the client。代码：DTLS compatibility mode is disabled for TLS 1.3-over-DTLS. The client emits DTLS 1.2 as legacy_version, uses an empty session_id unless an older session ID is being resumed, and the DTLS 1.3 server deliberately avoids echoing client legacy_session_id. 结论：相关标准要求由 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 路径实现；代码证据覆盖构造、解析、状态更新或错误处理路径。

The client emits DTLS 1.2 as legacy_version, uses an empty session_id unless an older session ID is being resumed, and the DTLS 1.3 server deliberately avoids echoing client legacy_session_id. 结论：相关标准要求由 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 路径实现；代码证据覆盖构造、解析、状态更新或错误处理路径。

The client emits DTLS 1.2 as legacy_version, uses an empty session_id unless an older session ID is being resumed, and the DTLS 1.3 server deliberately avoids echoing client legacy_session_id. 结论：相关标准要求由 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 路径实现；代码证据覆盖构造、解析、状态更新或错误处理路径。

The client emits DTLS 1.2 as legacy_version, uses an empty session_id unless an older session ID is being resumed, and the DTLS 1.3 server deliberately avoids echoing client legacy_session_id. 结论：相关标准要求由 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 路径实现；代码证据覆盖构造、解析、状态更新或错误处理路径。

results.comparison_summary: 需求：in DTLS 1.3 ServerHello 时 legacy_version set to constant。标准：RFC 9147 Section 5.3 and Section 5.4, ClientHello and ServerHello；原始抽取依据为：the legacy_version field is set to 0xfefd, indicating DTLS 1.2.。代码：DTLS compatibility mode is disabled for TLS 1.3-over-DTLS. The client emits DTLS 1.2 as legacy_version, uses an empty session_id unless an older session ID is being resumed, and the DTLS 1.3 server deliberately avoids echoing client legacy_session_id. 结论：相关标准要求由 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 路径实现；代码证据覆盖构造、解析、状态更新或错误处理路径。

results.change_condition: for DTLS over TCP or SCTP
results.new_value: must not exceed the maximum record size of 2^14 bytes
results.comment: BoringSSL's DTLS implementation targets datagram transports in this code path; the TCP/SCTP upper-layer mapping requirement is outside the audited implementation surface
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4, DTLSCiphertext and datagram record boundaries
results.comparison_summary: 需求：for DTLS over TCP or SCTP 时 length validated range check。标准：RFC 9147 Section 4, DTLSCiphertext and datagram record boundaries；原始抽取依据为：the upper layer protocol MUST NOT write any record that exceeds the maximum record size of 2^14 bytes.。代码：The receiver recognizes DTLS 1.3 L-bit records, uses explicit length-prefix parsing when L is set, consumes the rest of the datagram when L is clear, and bounds ciphertext length. The sender always sets L and writes a 16-bit length, which is permitted because omitting length is optional and only allowed for the final record. 结论：BoringSSL's DTLS implementation targets datagram transports in this code path; the TCP/SCTP upper-layer mapping requirement is outside the audited implementation surface。

results.change_condition: when the L bit is cleared
results.new_value: record consumes the entire rest of the datagram in the lower level transport
results.comment: 相关标准要求由 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 路径实现；代码证据覆盖构造、解析、状态更新或错误处理路径
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4, DTLSCiphertext and datagram record boundaries
results.comparison_summary: 需求：when the L bit is cleared 时 length derived/computed from another field。标准：RFC 9147 Section 4, DTLSCiphertext and datagram record boundaries；原始抽取依据为：which means that the record consumes the entire rest of the datagram in the lower level transport.。代码：The receiver recognizes DTLS 1.3 L-bit records, uses explicit length-prefix parsing when L is set, consumes the rest of the datagram when L is clear, and bounds ciphertext length. The sender always sets L and writes a 16-bit length, which is permitted because omitting length is optional and only allowed for the final record. 结论：相关标准要求由 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 路径实现；代码证据覆盖构造、解析、状态更新或错误处理路径。

results.comparison_summary: 需求：when verifying the explicit record length 时 length validated range check。标准：RFC 9147 Section 4, DTLSCiphertext and datagram record boundaries；原始抽取依据为：Do you verify that the explicit record length is contained within the datagram in which it is contained?。代码：The receiver recognizes DTLS 1.3 L-bit records, uses explicit length-prefix parsing when L is set, consumes the rest of the datagram when L is clear, and bounds ciphertext length. The sender always sets L and writes a 16-bit length, which is permitted because omitting length is optional and only allowed for the final record. 结论：相关标准要求由 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 路径实现；代码证据覆盖构造、解析、状态更新或错误处理路径。

results.change_condition: If the HelloRetryRequest message is used.
results.comment: 相关标准要求由 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 路径实现；代码证据覆盖构造、解析、状态更新或错误处理路径
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3 and Section 5.5; TLS 1.3 Section 4.4.1 message_hash
results.comparison_summary: 需求：If the HelloRetryRequest message is used. 时 message_hash computed according to referenced procedure。标准：RFC 9147 Section 5.3 and Section 5.5; TLS 1.3 Section 4.4.1 message_hash；原始抽取依据为：If the HelloRetryRequest message is used, the initial ClientHello and the HelloRetryRequest are included in the calculation of the transcript hash. The computation of the message hash for the HelloRetryRequest is done according to the description in Section 4.4.1 of [TLS13].。代码：BoringSSL transforms DTLS 1.3 transcript input into TLS 1.3 Handshake format by omitting message_seq, fragment_offset, and fragment_length, and uses SSL3_MT_MESSAGE_HASH when HelloRetryRequest rewrites the transcript. 结论：相关标准要求由 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 路径实现；代码证据覆盖构造、解析、状态更新或错误处理路径。

results.comparison_summary:
需求：ClientHello in the example exchange 时 message_seq set to constant。标准：RFC 9147 Section 5.2 and Section 5.5, DTLSHandshake sequencing and fragmentation；原始抽取依据为：ClientHello
    (message_seq=0)。代码：The DTLS handshake layer initializes read and write sequence counters at zero, writes the current sequence into new handshake messages, increments only when a new non-CCS handshake message is queued, discards fragments below the read counter, queues fragments within the flight window, and retransmits from stored outgoing messages without assigning a new message_seq. 结论：相关标准要求由 BoringSSL 的 DTLS 1.3 路径实现；代码证据覆盖构造、解析、状态更新或错误处理路径。

results.change_action: validated upper-bound exception / may return fewer than requested
results.change_condition: Handling a request considered excessive
results.new_value: fewer than num_cids CIDs, including no CIDs at all
results.related_state_or_step: Sending NewConnectionId in response to excessive RequestConnectionId
results.comment: no DTLS 1.3 Connection ID request state machine or NewConnectionId response path was found
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 9, Connection ID Updates; RFC 9146 connection_id extension
results.comparison_summary: 需求：Handling a request considered excessive 时 num_cids validated upper-bound exception / may return fewer than requested。标准：RFC 9147 Section 9, Connection ID Updates; RFC 9146 connection_id extension；原始抽取依据为：An endpoint MAY handle requests which it considers excessive by responding with a NewConnectionId message containing fewer than num_cids CIDs, including no CIDs at all.。代码：BoringSSL explicitly never sends Connection ID in DTLS 1.3 record headers and rejects inbound records with the CID bit set. Searches found no RequestConnectionId, NewConnectionId, cid_spare, num_cids, or connection_id extension state machine in the library, so CID request/response requirements are not implemented. 结论：no DTLS 1.3 Connection ID request state machine or NewConnectionId response path was found。

results.change_condition: Responding to RequestConnectionId
results.related_state_or_step: Sending NewConnectionId in response to RequestConnectionId
results.comment: no RequestConnectionId parser/handler or cid_spare NewConnectionId generator was found
results.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 9, Connection ID Updates; RFC 9146 connection_id extension
results.comparison_summary: 需求：Responding to RequestConnectionId 时 num_cids copy from requested value。标准：RFC 9147 Section 9, Connection ID Updates; RFC 9146 connection_id extension；原始抽取依据为：Endpoints SHOULD respond to RequestConnectionId by sending a NewConnectionId with usage "cid_spare" containing num_cids CIDs as soon as possible.。代码：BoringSSL explicitly never sends Connection ID in DTLS 1.3 record headers and rejects inbound records with the CID bit set. Searches found no RequestConnectionId, NewConnectionId, cid_spare, num_cids, or connection_id extension state machine in the library, so CID request/response requirements are not implemented. 结论：no RequestConnectionId parser/handler or cid_spare NewConnectionId generator was found。
